where.if: AND ( LOWER(COALESCE(REASON_SUMMARY, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(ENTITY_ID, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(ACTOR_ID, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' )

AND ( LOWER(COALESCE(COMPONENT_ID, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(FUNCTION_ID, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(API_ID, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' )

AND ( LOWER(COALESCE(REQUEST_URI, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(ACTOR_ID, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(REMOTE_ADDR, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(ACTOR_INSTT_ID, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(COMPANY_CONTEXT_ID, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' )

AND ( LOWER(COALESCE(MESSAGE, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(REQUEST_URI, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(ACTOR_ID, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(PAGE_ID, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(API_ID, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' )

mapper.select:
SELECT AUDIT_ID AS auditId, PROJECT_ID AS projectId, TRACE_ID AS traceId, REQUEST_ID AS requestId, ACTOR_ID AS actorId, ACTOR_ROLE AS actorRole, MENU_CODE AS menuCode, PAGE_ID AS pageId, ACTION_CODE AS actionCode, ENTITY_TYPE AS entityType, ENTITY_ID AS entityId, BEFORE_SUMMARY AS beforeSummaryJson, AFTER_SUMMARY AS afterSummaryJson, RESULT_STATUS AS resultStatus, REASON_SUMMARY AS reasonSummary, IP_ADDRESS AS ipAddress, USER_AGENT AS userAgent, REQUEST_URI AS requestUri, HTTP_METHOD AS httpMethod, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt FROM AUDIT_EVENT
ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT AUDIT_ID AS auditId, PROJECT_ID AS projectId, TRACE_ID AS traceId, REQUEST_ID AS requestId, ACTOR_ID AS actorId, ACTOR_ROLE AS actorRole, MENU_CODE AS menuCode, PAGE_ID AS pageId, ACTION_CODE AS actionCode, ENTITY_TYPE AS entityType, ENTITY_ID AS entityId, '' AS beforeSummaryJson, '[after summary omitted: compact fallback]' AS afterSummaryJson, RESULT_STATUS AS resultStatus, REASON_SUMMARY AS reasonSummary, IP_ADDRESS AS ipAddress, USER_AGENT AS userAgent, REQUEST_URI AS requestUri, HTTP_METHOD AS httpMethod, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt FROM AUDIT_EVENT
ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT EVENT_ID AS eventId, PROJECT_ID AS projectId, TRACE_ID AS traceId, SPAN_ID AS spanId, PARENT_SPAN_ID AS parentSpanId, EVENT_TYPE AS eventType, PAGE_ID AS pageId, COMPONENT_ID AS componentId, FUNCTION_ID AS functionId, API_ID AS apiId, RESULT_CODE AS resultCode, DURATION_MS AS durationMs, PAYLOAD_SUMMARY AS payloadSummaryJson, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt FROM TRACE_EVENT
ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT EVENT_ID AS eventId, PROJECT_ID AS projectId, TRACE_ID AS traceId, SPAN_ID AS spanId, PARENT_SPAN_ID AS parentSpanId, EVENT_TYPE AS eventType, PAGE_ID AS pageId, COMPONENT_ID AS componentId, FUNCTION_ID AS functionId, API_ID AS apiId, RESULT_CODE AS resultCode, DURATION_MS AS durationMs, '' AS payloadSummaryJson, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt FROM TRACE_EVENT
ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT EVENT_ID AS eventId, PROJECT_ID AS projectId, TRACE_ID AS traceId, REQUEST_ID AS requestId, PAGE_ID AS pageId, API_ID AS apiId, REQUEST_URI AS requestUri, HTTP_METHOD AS httpMethod, FEATURE_TYPE AS featureType, ACTOR_ID AS actorId, ACTOR_TYPE AS actorType, ACTOR_ROLE AS actorRole, ACTOR_INSTT_ID AS actorInsttId, COMPANY_CONTEXT_ID AS companyContextId, TARGET_COMPANY_CONTEXT_ID AS targetCompanyContextId, REMOTE_ADDR AS remoteAddr, RESPONSE_STATUS AS responseStatus, DURATION_MS AS durationMs, REQUEST_CONTENT_TYPE AS requestContentType, "QUERY_STRING" AS queryString, PARAMETER_SUMMARY AS parameterSummary, ERROR_MESSAGE AS errorMessage, COMPANY_SCOPE_DECISION AS companyScopeDecision, COMPANY_SCOPE_REASON AS companyScopeReason, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt FROM ACCESS_EVENT
ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT EVENT_ID AS eventId, PROJECT_ID AS projectId, TRACE_ID AS traceId, REQUEST_ID AS requestId, PAGE_ID AS pageId, API_ID AS apiId, REQUEST_URI AS requestUri, HTTP_METHOD AS httpMethod, FEATURE_TYPE AS featureType, ACTOR_ID AS actorId, ACTOR_TYPE AS actorType, ACTOR_ROLE AS actorRole, ACTOR_INSTT_ID AS actorInsttId, COMPANY_CONTEXT_ID AS companyContextId, TARGET_COMPANY_CONTEXT_ID AS targetCompanyContextId, REMOTE_ADDR AS remoteAddr, RESPONSE_STATUS AS responseStatus, DURATION_MS AS durationMs, REQUEST_CONTENT_TYPE AS requestContentType, "QUERY_STRING" AS queryString, '' AS parameterSummary, '' AS errorMessage, COMPANY_SCOPE_DECISION AS companyScopeDecision, '[company scope reason omitted: compact fallback]' AS companyScopeReason, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt FROM ACCESS_EVENT
ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT ERROR_ID AS errorId, PROJECT_ID AS projectId, TRACE_ID AS traceId, REQUEST_ID AS requestId, PAGE_ID AS pageId, API_ID AS apiId, SOURCE_TYPE AS sourceType, ERROR_TYPE AS errorType, ACTOR_ID AS actorId, ACTOR_ROLE AS actorRole, ACTOR_INSTT_ID AS actorInsttId, REQUEST_URI AS requestUri, REMOTE_ADDR AS remoteAddr, MESSAGE AS message, STACK_SUMMARY AS stackSummary, RESULT_STATUS AS resultStatus, USER_AGENT AS userAgent, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt FROM ERROR_EVENT
ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT ERROR_ID AS errorId, PROJECT_ID AS projectId, TRACE_ID AS traceId, REQUEST_ID AS requestId, PAGE_ID AS pageId, API_ID AS apiId, SOURCE_TYPE AS sourceType, ERROR_TYPE AS errorType, ACTOR_ID AS actorId, ACTOR_ROLE AS actorRole, ACTOR_INSTT_ID AS actorInsttId, REQUEST_URI AS requestUri, REMOTE_ADDR AS remoteAddr, '[message omitted: compact fallback]' AS message, '' AS stackSummary, RESULT_STATUS AS resultStatus, USER_AGENT AS userAgent, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt FROM ERROR_EVENT
ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
